name: Show Subclasses
title: Show Subclasses
description: Traverse subclass_of edges to find subclasses of the selected class.
queryText:
WITH ontology_classes, ontology_properties, documents, subclass_of, equivalent_class, has_property, related_to, extracted_from
FOR node IN @nodes
  FOR v, e IN 1..1 INBOUND node subclass_of
    FILTER e.expired == 9223372036854775807
    LIMIT 100
    RETURN e

name: Show Superclasses
title: Show Superclasses
description: Traverse upward to find parent classes.
queryText:
WITH ontology_classes, ontology_properties, documents, subclass_of, equivalent_class, has_property, related_to, extracted_from
FOR node IN @nodes
  FOR v, e IN 1..1 OUTBOUND node subclass_of
    FILTER e.expired == 9223372036854775807
    LIMIT 100
    RETURN e

name: Show Properties
title: Show Properties
description: Show all properties defined on the selected class.
queryText:
WITH ontology_classes, ontology_properties, documents, subclass_of, equivalent_class, has_property, related_to, extracted_from
FOR node IN @nodes
  FOR v, e IN 1..1 OUTBOUND node has_property
    FILTER e.expired == 9223372036854775807
    LIMIT 100
    RETURN e

name: Show Full Hierarchy
title: Show Full Hierarchy
description: Full class hierarchy (up to 10 levels deep).
queryText:
WITH ontology_classes, ontology_properties, documents, subclass_of, equivalent_class, has_property, related_to, extracted_from
FOR node IN @nodes
  FOR v, e IN 1..10 ANY node subclass_of
    FILTER e.expired == 9223372036854775807
    LIMIT 200
    RETURN e

name: Show Related Classes
title: Show Related Classes
description: Traverse related_to edges from the selected class.
queryText:
WITH ontology_classes, ontology_properties, documents, subclass_of, equivalent_class, has_property, related_to, extracted_from
FOR node IN @nodes
  FOR v, e IN 1..1 ANY node related_to
    FILTER e.expired == 9223372036854775807
    LIMIT 100
    RETURN e

name: Show Cross-Tier Links
title: Show Cross-Tier Links
description: Traverse extends_domain links between local and domain ontology entities.
queryText:
WITH ontology_classes, ontology_properties, documents, subclass_of, equivalent_class, has_property, related_to, extracted_from, extends_domain
FOR node IN @nodes
  FOR v, e IN 1..1 ANY node extends_domain
    FILTER e.expired == 9223372036854775807
    LIMIT 100
    RETURN e

name: Show Provenance
title: Show Provenance
description: Trace the selected class back to its source document.
queryText:
WITH ontology_classes, ontology_properties, documents, subclass_of, equivalent_class, has_property, related_to, extracted_from
FOR node IN @nodes
  FOR v, e IN 1..1 OUTBOUND node extracted_from
    LIMIT 50
    RETURN e

name: Full Neighborhood
title: Full Neighborhood
description: Expand all relationships 1-2 hops from the selected node.
queryText:
WITH ontology_classes, ontology_properties, documents, subclass_of, equivalent_class, has_property, related_to, extracted_from
FOR node IN @nodes
  FOR v, e IN 1..2 ANY node GRAPH 'domain_ontology'
    FILTER e.expired == 9223372036854775807
    LIMIT 100
    RETURN e
